extraction.one_line_summary: MOLLEMA Bauke attacked solo on penultimate climb while favorites watched each other, held 30+ seconds through finale to win by 16 seconds over VALVERDE-BERNAL sprint.
tactical_patterns: MOLLEMA attacked when pace slowed on penultimate climb, not waiting for Muro di Sormano finale where favorites expected action.
INEOS controlled early Madonna del Ghisallo with multiple riders despite BERNAL being sole protected leader, wasting domestique firepower.
VALVERDE bridged to CICCONE group on Sormano but favorites' mutual surveillance allowed distanced MOLLEMA to stay clear until finish.
FUGLSANG finished fourth after incredible season, suggesting form peaks extended deeper into October than typical Monument preparation.

rider_signals.MOLLEMA Bauke: positive: First Monument win at 33 by recognizing favorites' hesitation one climb early, showing mature tactical reading.
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: Second place sprint after Tour de France win confirms October form sustainability rare for Grand Tour winners.
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: positive: Alert bridge to CICCONE move and second place at 39 shows continued Monument threat despite age.
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: positive: Fourth place caps incredible season, demonstrates consistency across Monument calendar when positioned correctly.
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: Dropped penultimate climb as former winner signals fading Lombardia competitiveness, no longer automatic threat.
rider_signals.CICCONE Giulio: neutral: Initiated strong selection on Sormano but presence in move didn't translate to podium threat.
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: positive: Fifth place confirms climbing form post-Worlds, strong Monument result for rider improving late-season.
rider_signals.HAGEN Carl Fredrik: positive: Sixth place exceeds typical results profile, suggesting breakaway-to-selection tactics work better than pure climbing.
rider_signals.MASNADA Fausto: neutral: Early breakaway presence shows INEOS willing to place second card forward before committing to BERNAL.
rider_signals.SOSA Iván Ramiro: neutral: Presence in CICCONE group indicates climbing level but youth/inexperience prevented capitalizing on selection.
